notes: Two-leg Brent/WTI crude benchmark spread breakout basket from the approved CME-WTI-BRENT-SPREAD-2026_S02 card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX host setfile and reads XTIUSD.DWX and XBRUSD.DWX D1 close series to compute a log-price spread channel breakout. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket and validate XBRUSD.DWX history sufficiency.
